message:
fix(node): length-prefix hash inputs in 4 files to prevent delimiter-collision attacks

lease_coordinator: lease_id + node_id (1 site)
migration_pipeline: 6 hash functions across generate_plan/issue_receipt (10 sites)
transparency_verifier: hash_pair left + right (1 site)
compatibility_gate: sign() key + payload (1 site)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
